channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Family of Belfast victim appeals for calm and stresses ‘deeply valuable contribution’ of many migrants – UK politics live
item.description: Family of Belfast victim appeals for calm and stresses ‘deeply valuable contribution’ of many migrants – UK politics live

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Novara Media: Son of ‘Palestinian Nelson Mandela’ Joins Massive Attack on Tour
item.description: Son of ‘Palestinian Nelson Mandela’ Joins Massive Attack on Tour

item.title: ITVX: Starmer says Belfast disorder 'totally unjustified' and calls for calm and order - ITVX
item.description: Starmer says Belfast disorder 'totally unjustified' and calls for calm and order - ITVX

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer dithering over defence spending, says Badenoch
item.description: Starmer dithering over defence spending, says Badenoch

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reform ‘not aware’ of more large gifts but cannot check all members, says Tice
item.description: Reform ‘not aware’ of more large gifts but cannot check all members, says Tice

item.title: Byline Times: Keir Starmer Urged to Stop London Event ‘Promoting Land Grab’ in Occupied Palestine
item.description: Keir Starmer Urged to Stop London Event ‘Promoting Land Grab’ in Occupied Palestine

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Only way to keep British energy prices down is closer ties with Europe, says Starmer’s top negotiator
item.description: Only way to keep British energy prices down is closer ties with Europe, says Starmer’s top negotiator

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer promises ‘full force of the law’ as Northern Ireland braces for more riots
item.description: Starmer promises ‘full force of the law’ as Northern Ireland braces for more riots

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Starmer should have no hesitation in labelling Musk a threat to democracy and national security rather than merely accusing him of “division”.
item.description: Starmer should have no hesitation in labelling Musk a threat to democracy and national security rather than merely accusing him of “division”.
